hero.name: Renjith Anil
hero.title: SOFTWARE ENGINEER - AI/ML SYSTEMS & APPLIED INTELLIGENCE
hero.availability: Available for SDE / ML Engineer Roles — 2026
hero.tagline: Building real-time AI systems, distributed ML pipelines, and production-grade backend integrations.

description: I am a Software Engineer specializing in **ML Systems and Applied Intelligence**, with a deep focus on building scalable, production-grade AI infrastructure. I bridge the gap between academic research and real-world deployment by optimizing inference pipelines and parallelizing large-scale model training.

My core expertise lies in **Distributed Systems for AI**, where I've successfully implemented OpenMPI-based frameworks to reduce training latency by 40%. I thrive on the engineering challenges of low-latency computer vision (~30 FPS) and containerized anomaly detection systems integrated with cloud-native monitoring (Prometheus).

Beyond model metrics, I prioritize **system reliability and observability**. Whether it's architecting AWS SageMaker workflows or designing secure REST APIs for ML model delivery, I ensure that AI solutions are not just accurate, but robust, monitorable, and scalable.

I am passionate about building the underlying infrastructure that makes modern AI work at scale, combining strong CS fundamentals with hands-on experience in distributed computing and backend engineering.
